zh.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl於1792年12月16日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州。她和George J. Reichley至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1864年8月18日在美國俄亥俄州素米特諾頓 堂史普享年71歲，埋葬在美國俄亥俄州素米特劍橋大學默里 富蘭克林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl于1792年12月16日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州。她和George J. Reichley至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1864年8月18日在美国俄亥俄州素米特諾頓 堂史普享年71岁，埋葬在美国俄亥俄州素米特劍橋大學默里 富蘭克林。

nameMeanings.name: Rayl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Rehl   or   Roehl  .

variants.name: Rehl
meanings: probably a habitational name from Rehl in Rhineland or Rehlen in former East Prussia.

nameMeanings.name: Magdalene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.
Ohio was the first state admitted to the Union from the Northwest Territory.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.

historicEvents.title: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War
historicEvents.description: Although divided as a state on the subject of slavery, Ohio participated in the Civil War on the Union's side, providing over 300,000 troops. Ohio provided the 3rd largest number of troops by any Union state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Ohio supports the Union side of the Civil War

historicEvents.title: Battle of Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The three day Battle of Gettysburg was one of the bloodiest of the American Civil War. Between the Confederates and Unions, somewhere between 46,000 and 51,000 people died that day.

en.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl was born on 16 December 1792, in Pennsylvania, United States. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with George J. Reichley. She died on 18 August 1864, in Norton Township, Summit, Ohio, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in New Franklin, Summit, Ohio, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: Magdalene Raylは1792年12月16日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州で生まれた。彼女はGeorge J. Reichleyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1864年8月18日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州スンミトノートン トウンシュイップで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国オハイオ州スンミトニュー フランクリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl(은)는 1792년 12월 16일 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 George J. Reichley(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1864년 8월 18일 미국 오하이오 주 수미 노르턴 타운시프에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 오하이오 주 수미 뉴 프랭클린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl nasceu em 16 de dezembro de 1792, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com George J. Reichley. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1864, em Norton Township, Summit, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em New Franklin, Summit, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl родилась 16 декабря 1792 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от George J. Reichley. Она умерла 18 августа 1864 г. в местности нортон тоуншип, суммит, Огайо, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности ню фрэнклинь, суммит, Огайо, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Magdalene Rayl nació el 16 de diciembre de 1792, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con George J. Reichley. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1864, en Norton Township, Summit, Ohio, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en New Franklin, Summit, Ohio, Estados Unidos.
